trophies.title: Get the Ball Rolling
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 1.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You cleared your first climb level. The ball is officially rolling.

trophies.title: Training Wheels Off
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 10.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten levels down — the training wheels are off.

trophies.title: Gathering Momentum
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 50.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Fifty levels cleared. That's momentum.

trophies.title: Beyond the Meadow
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 100 — all of World 1, Meadowgate.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Meadowgate is behind you. Forty-nine worlds to go.

trophies.title: Boulder and Bolder
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 250.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Two hundred and fifty levels — boulder and bolder with every roll.

trophies.title: The Long Roll
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 500.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five hundred levels. This is the long roll, and you're still rolling.

trophies.title: Unstoppable Force
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 1,000.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One thousand levels cleared. Unstoppable.

trophies.title: The Summit
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear climb level 5,000 — the last level of World 50, The Summit.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Level 5,000. World 50. The Summit is yours.

trophies.title: Star Search
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 25 climb stars.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Twenty-five stars found. Keep searching.

trophies.title: Star-Studded
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 150 climb stars.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred and fifty stars — a star-studded run.

trophies.title: One Hundred Perfect Rolls
trophies.lockedDescription: Hold 3 stars on every level of any single world.
trophies.unlockedDescription: All 100 levels of one world at 3 stars. One hundred perfect rolls.

trophies.title: Magpie
trophies.lockedDescription: Bank 100 level pickup coins.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred shiny pickups banked. Classic magpie.

trophies.title: Sidetracked
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear level 1 of any Challenge Track.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First track level cleared — happily sidetracked.

trophies.title: Deep in the Pack
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach level 50 in any single Challenge Track.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Level 50 of a track — you're deep in the pack now.

trophies.title: Track Record
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete any Challenge Track.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred levels, one track, complete. That's a track record.

trophies.title: Triple Crown
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete 3 Challenge Tracks.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Three tracks completed — the Triple Crown is yours.

trophies.title: Run the Gauntlet
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete the Golden Gauntlet track.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You ran the Golden Gauntlet and came out golden.

trophies.title: Full Circuit
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete all 8 Challenge Tracks.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Every track, every level — 800 levels of arc. Full circuit.

trophies.title: Glutton for Punishment
trophies.lockedDescription: Start your first Challenge of the Day.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You started a Challenge of the Day. Brave. Possibly foolish. Definitely brave.

trophies.title: Carpe Rollem
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete your first Challenge of the Day.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You seized the day — and cleared it. Carpe rollem.

trophies.title: Seven-Day Roller
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach a 7-day daily reward streak.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Seven days straight. A true seven-day roller.

trophies.title: Ten Brutal Mornings
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete 10 Challenges of the Day.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten brutal challenges, ten clears.

trophies.title: Month of Marbles
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach a 30-day daily reward streak.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Thirty days running — a whole month of marbles.

trophies.title: Fifty Days of Grit
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete 50 Challenges of the Day.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Fifty of the game's hardest days, cleared. Pure grit.

trophies.title: The Brutal Week
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete the Challenge of the Day on 7 consecutive days.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Seven consecutive daily clears. The Brutal Week, survived.

trophies.title: Taste of the Arcade
trophies.lockedDescription: Play 5 different minigames.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five minigames sampled — a proper taste of the arcade.

trophies.title: The Grand Tour
trophies.lockedDescription: Play all 12 minigames at least once.
trophies.unlockedDescription: All 12 minigames played. The grand tour is complete.

trophies.title: Opening Night
trophies.lockedDescription: Win your first competitive minigame.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First competitive win — and your first ticket. What an opening night.

trophies.title: Six of the Best
trophies.lockedDescription: Win at least once in each of the 6 competitive minigames.
trophies.unlockedDescription: A win in all six competitive modes. Six of the best.

trophies.title: Hard Bargain
trophies.lockedDescription: Win any competitive minigame on Hard difficulty.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You beat the Hard AI at its own game. A hard bargain, won.

trophies.title: Hundred-Round Veteran
trophies.lockedDescription: Win 100 competitive minigame rounds.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred competitive wins. A true arcade veteran.

trophies.title: Master of All Six
trophies.lockedDescription: Win on Hard in all 6 competitive minigames.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Every competitive mode, beaten on Hard. Master of all six.

trophies.title: Last Comet Standing
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a Comet Clash round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: The last comet standing was yours.

trophies.title: Ten-Tail Comet
trophies.lockedDescription: Win 10 Comet Clash rounds.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten Comet Clash wins — a comet with ten tails.

trophies.title: King of the Ring
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a Sumo Survival match.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Last marble in the ring. King of the ring.

trophies.title: Immovable Object
trophies.lockedDescription: Win 10 Sumo Survival matches.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten sumo wins. You are the immovable object.

trophies.title: Fresh Coat
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a Paint Ball round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: The floor wears your colors. Fresh coat, nicely applied.

trophies.title: Wall-to-Wall
trophies.lockedDescription: Finish a Paint Ball round with 60% floor coverage.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Sixty percent of the floor, painted. Wall-to-wall you.

trophies.title: Smash Hit
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a Smash and Grab round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Smashed, grabbed, won. A smash hit.

trophies.title: Serial Smasher
trophies.lockedDescription: Win 10 Smash and Grab rounds.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten Smash and Grab wins. Serial smasher, confirmed.

trophies.title: Top Corner
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a Marble Cup match.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Goal! Your first Marble Cup match, won in style.

trophies.title: League Regular
trophies.lockedDescription: Win 10 Marble Cup matches.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten cup wins — a league regular now.

trophies.title: Hill, Claimed
trophies.lockedDescription: Win a King of the Hill round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: The hill is yours. Claimed.

trophies.title: Squatter's Rights
trophies.lockedDescription: Hold the hill for 45 seconds total in a single round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Forty-five seconds on the hill in one round. Squatter's rights, earned.

trophies.title: Bumper Crop
trophies.lockedDescription: Score 10,000 in a single Pinball game.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten thousand points — a real bumper crop.

trophies.title: Silver Ball Society
trophies.lockedDescription: Score 50,000 in a single Pinball game.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Fifty thousand points. Welcome to the Silver Ball Society.

trophies.title: Lit the Special
trophies.lockedDescription: Score 150,000 in a single Pinball game.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred and fifty thousand points. You lit the Special.

trophies.title: Out of the Woods
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach the goal of your first Roll Out maze.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First maze solved — you're out of the woods.

trophies.title: Ten-Maze March
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach maze 10 in Roll Out.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten mazes deep. The ten-maze march is complete.

trophies.title: The Only Way Is Up
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach 100 m height in a Roll Up run.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One hundred meters up. The only way is up.

trophies.title: Head in the Clouds
trophies.lockedDescription: Reach 500 m height in a Roll Up run.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five hundred meters. Head officially in the clouds.

trophies.title: Crossing Guard
trophies.lockedDescription: Make 25 crossings in a single Disco Ball run on any difficulty.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Twenty-five crossings in one run. Crossing guard on duty.

trophies.title: Dancing in the Dark
trophies.lockedDescription: Make 10 crossings in a single Disco Ball run on Hard.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten crossings on Hard. Dancing in the dark, flawlessly.

trophies.title: Inner Peace
trophies.lockedDescription: Accumulate 1 hour of Zen Garden time.
trophies.unlockedDescription: One full hour in the garden. Inner peace, achieved.

trophies.title: Garden Sage
trophies.lockedDescription: Accumulate 10 hours of Zen Garden time.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten hours among the sand and stones. A true garden sage.

trophies.title: Pit Stop
trophies.lockedDescription: Play your first Coin Pit round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First trip to the Coin Pit. A profitable pit stop.

trophies.title: Cloudburst
trophies.lockedDescription: Catch 90 coins in a single Coin Pit round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ninety coins from one cloudburst. Elite reflexes.

trophies.title: Retail Therapy
trophies.lockedDescription: Buy any cosmetic, bundle, or ball pack with coins.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Your first coin purchase. Retail therapy works.

trophies.title: The Full Fit
trophies.lockedDescription: Have a non-starter cosmetic equipped in all 7 slots at once.
trophies.unlockedDescription: All seven slots, fully customized. That's the full fit.

trophies.title: Boxed Set
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete any cosmetic bundle.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First bundle complete — a proper boxed set.

trophies.title: Bag of Marbles
trophies.lockedDescription: Own 10 ball skins.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten ball skins owned. A respectable bag of marbles.

trophies.title: Curator
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete 5 cosmetic bundles.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five bundles complete. The collection has a curator.

trophies.title: Collector's Eye
trophies.lockedDescription: Own 50 cosmetics across all 7 slots.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Fifty cosmetics owned. You have a collector's eye.

trophies.title: Pack Animal
trophies.lockedDescription: Own any ball pack.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First ball pack acquired. Pack animal.

trophies.title: Marble Baron
trophies.lockedDescription: Own 40 ball skins.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Forty ball skins. Bow to the Marble Baron.

trophies.title: Every Marble Has a Home
trophies.lockedDescription: Own every evergreen coin-or-skill-reachable cosmetic.
trophies.unlockedDescription: The whole evergreen catalogue, yours. Every marble has a home.

trophies.title: Nest Egg
trophies.lockedDescription: Hold 1,000 coins at once.
trophies.unlockedDescription: A thousand coins in the bank. A tidy nest egg.

trophies.title: Punch Card
trophies.lockedDescription: Claim 30 daily login rewards.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Thirty daily rewards claimed. Punch card, fully punched.

trophies.title: Working Capital
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 5,000 lifetime coins from play.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five thousand coins earned the honest way. Working capital.

trophies.title: Pit Boss
trophies.lockedDescription: Catch 2,500 lifetime coins in Coin Pit rounds.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Twenty-five hundred coins from the pit. The pit has a boss.

trophies.title: Hello, Rollers
trophies.lockedDescription: Sign in with Apple for the first time.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Signed in and ready to roll with others. Hello, rollers.

trophies.title: Rolling Together
trophies.lockedDescription: Have your first accepted friend.
trophies.unlockedDescription: First friend added. Rolling together now.

trophies.title: Rolling Deep
trophies.lockedDescription: Have 5 accepted friends.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five friends strong. Rolling deep.

trophies.title: Lifesaver
trophies.lockedDescription: Send a life to a friend.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You sent a friend a life. Certified lifesaver.

trophies.title: Guardian Marble
trophies.lockedDescription: Send 25 lives to friends and clanmates.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Twenty-five lives given. A true guardian marble.

trophies.title: Strength in Numbers
trophies.lockedDescription: Join or create a clan.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You found your people. Strength in numbers.

trophies.title: Clutch Delivery
trophies.lockedDescription: Fulfill a clanmate's life request.
trophies.unlockedDescription: A clanmate needed a life — you delivered. Clutch.

trophies.title: Peak Performance
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 3 stars on any very-hard climb level above level 10.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Three stars on a very-hard level. Peak performance.

trophies.title: Gone in Ten Seconds
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear any climb level in 10 seconds or less.
trophies.unlockedDescription: A level cleared in ten seconds flat. Gone.

trophies.title: Clean Sheet
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear 10 climb levels in a row without a single fall.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Ten straight clears, zero falls. A clean sheet.

trophies.title: First Try!
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 3 stars on a level on your very first attempt.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Three stars, first attempt, no notes. First try!

trophies.title: Spotless
trophies.lockedDescription: Earn 3 stars and bank all 3 pickup coins in one single run.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Three stars, three coins, one run. Spotless.

trophies.title: Untouchable
trophies.lockedDescription: Clear 25 climb levels in a row without a single fall.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Twenty-five clears without a single fall. Untouchable.

trophies.title: Gravity Check
trophies.lockedDescription: Fall into the pit on climb level 1.
trophies.unlockedDescription: You fell into the pit on level 1. Gravity: confirmed working.

trophies.title: Night Bloom
trophies.lockedDescription: Tend the Zen Garden between midnight and 4 AM.
trophies.unlockedDescription: The garden blooms at 3 AM, apparently. So do you.

trophies.title: R-O-L-L Call
trophies.lockedDescription: Complete all four ROLL rollover lanes in a single pinball ball.
trophies.unlockedDescription: R-O-L-L — all four lanes, one ball. Roll call complete.

trophies.title: High Roller
trophies.lockedDescription: Stake 5 or more tickets on a single Coin Pit round.
trophies.unlockedDescription: Five tickets on one round. A genuine high roller.

trophies.title: Back to Basics
trophies.lockedDescription: Equip the full all-starter loadout while owning 20 or more cosmetics.
trophies.unlockedDescription: A wardrobe of twenty-plus, and you chose the classics. Back to basics.

trophies.title: Platinum
trophies.lockedDescription: Unlock every visible Bronze, Silver, and Gold trophy.
trophies.unlockedDescription: All 73 visible Bronze, Silver, and Gold trophies. Platinum. The rarest roll of all.
